violations.text: The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Establishment shall add an indicating symbol to menu for food items that are offered raw or undercooked. Per PIC, symbols will be added when menus are reprinted. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live activity in the bar area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Raw animal foods such as duck eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as fruit juices and fruit sauces in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/25/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in walk-in cooler and chest freezers have an accumulation of white residue and ice accumulation respectively. Non-food contact surfaces to be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Inadequate lighting observed the outdoor walk-in cooler. Lighting levels must be sufficient enough to enable employees to perform certain functions such as reading labels, discerning the color of substances, recognizing the condition of food, utensils, and supplies; and safely conducting general food establishment operations and clean-up. Properly distributed light makes the need for cleaning apparent by making accumulations of soil conspicuous. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
